Record your entire bike adventure by combining Garmin devices with the Garmin VIRB XE Bike Combo Mount. This combo-bike support provides an easy installation for a Edge bike computer and a VIRB X or XE on your handlebar. This lowers your total weight by combining to supports into one and keep your cockpit clean. This support with extra long arm ensures you have a comfortable upright sit for a better view and more safety. You mount the Edge to the top and the VIRB to the bottom of the mount. The support is made of sturdy material, for stable footage and a good readability of your Edge bike computer.

Skulle helst varit lite längre.
De Garmin VIRB Combo Fietssteun is een uitstekend product. Makkelijk te monteren, sterk en degelijk.

A rich shake with a silky milk chocolate taste. A way to indulge your sweet tooth at only calories. A must for any chocoholic out there.
It is essential you are in good health and have a BMI of over to follow this programme. As with any diet, it is important to check with your doctor prior to starting.

Menaxhimi i projektit është procesi dhe aktiviteti i planifikimit, organizimit, motivimit dhe kontrollit të burimeve, procedurave dhe protokolleve për arritjen e qëllimeve specifike te projektit. Menaxhimi I Projektit mundëson harmonizimin e burimeve financiare, materiale dhe humane duke parandaluar maksimalisht ndodhitë e padëshiruara që shkaktojnë rritje të kostove dhe vonesa.
In the agricultural and industrial economies, companies needed "hard" workers, however the New Economy is putting a premium on "smart" workers. The explosion of knowledge, technology and the shortage of skilled workers have spawned an abundance of books and articles on the topics of lifelong learning, knowledge capital, and intellectual capital.
Learning and Development is increasingly occupying an important part in the list of the top priorities of organizations. Positive ambition towards growth is crucial and keeping up with the latest advancements is challenging. This is the reason why knowing how to effectively and efficiently design and administer learning plans has become so necessary.
This hands-on workshop addresses the importance of capturing the voice of the customer (VOC) to drive product development, presents how to undertake various VOC methodologies, discusses when they should be used, and leads participants through the process of planning how to capture the VOC.

On the occasion of New Year's Eve Oana Lianu will perform an extraordinary concert at the Opera House in Craiova.
Between December to the artist was in Germany, where she represented Romania at the International Conference of the Institute for Cultural Diplomacy, held this year in Berlin, along with other diplomatic envoys, distinguished political figures, cultural, and international academics.PhD. Oana Lianu lectured and performed two extraordinary concerts, on th and st.
Oana Lianu will attend on Friday night Red Cross Gala Romania, TVR recording, media partner of the Romanian Red Cross.
Oana Lianu performs a great musical Intermezzo, singing and playing Romanian folklore live at TVR, in the tv Romanian show Once in life, starting at . The artist performs together with the famous orchestra Lautarii from Chisinau.
Asociatia Pro Romania europeana organizeaza Simpozionul National dedicat Zilei de Decembrie, in Sala Mare a Primariei din Oradea. Ansamblul folcloric al Facultatii de Arte a Universitatii din Oradea, dirijor si coordonator Conf.Univ.Dr.Oana Lianu va incheia acest eveniment printr-un concert de cantece patriotice.
Associate Professor Dr. Oana Lianu - Committee member of The Contest for vacant teaching positions published by the Ministry of Education in Official Gazette no. of .., Part III.
The artist will perform an extraordinary concert on the occasion of Cultural Awards in Salaj county. The third edition of the gala is dedicated exclusively to Oana Lianu, during which she will award The Trophy of Excellence for her entire career.The event will take place in Zalau, Transylvania restaurant, at pm.
Artista va sustine un recital deosebit in care va prezenta vocal si la instrumente de suflat, intr-o maniera unica, Riturile de pasaj (Cantecul de leagan, Cantecul miresii, Cantecul de catanie si Bocetul), un schimb deosebit intre Facultatea de Litere si Facultatea de Arte.
The artist will perform an extraordinary concert at Gh.Lazar School from Zalau city.The occazion is the th anniversary and the launching of the book with the personalities who graduated here, among who is Oana Lianu herself too.
Oana Lianu is part of artists, very few in number, which combines exceptionally vocal with the instrumental interpretation. Pan flute and vocals give the feeling of a perfect symbiosis, forming a formidable duo ... It is noted the artist's personal way to play the greatest hits, by the harmonious interweaving of the pan flute with her voice - Autumn leaves, Ete Indien, Aux Champs Elysees, Besam mucho, Dream a Little Dream of Me, Summertime, The Skylark, etc. The addressed repertoire include an emotional universe, waiting and waiting, a universe in which the public is invited to enter unconditionally.
Spectacol de comedie bazat pe cupletele lui Constantin Tanase.Oana Lianu interpreteaza rolul Mariei Tanase, alaturi de actorul Sebastian Lupu, in rolul marelui comediant Constantin Tanase.
Concert cu prilejul implinirii a ani de la nasterea doctorului Ioan Lianu, doctor in medicina, fondatorul Dispensarului si a Scolii din Dumbraveni, comuna Crasna, judetul Gorj, unchiul artistei din partea tatalui. Primăria Crasna i-a acordat Oana Lianu Diploma de Excelenţă cu ocazia acestui eveniment deosebit.
Clubul Escape găzduiește duminică februarie, de la ora ., un concert în primă audiție absolută susținut de prințesa naiului, Oana Lianu.

The Ca' d'Oro or Palazzo Santa Sofia is a palace on the Grand Canal in Venice, northern Italy. One of the older palaces in the city, its name means "golden house" due to the gilt and polychrome external decorations which once adorned its walls. The palace was built between and for the Contarini family, who provided Venice with eight Doges between and .
The palace is a significant example of Venetian Gothic in the early th century.

In , for the first time our uncle opened in Munich the first restaurant and a short time later a "Gelateria" , as well as the legendary Pescatore in the "Schwanthalerstraße", the then in-meeting of the Munich high society and the place for before and after the "Deutsches" Theater. Over time, the Five Brothers united in Munich and thus began the legendary era of the Munich-Italians.
CA`D`ORO opening, then impressively decorated with lots of wood and gold accents. At the beginning, only Italian specialties were served in the restaurant, pizza was not available at this time in the restaurant.
Modernization of the restaurant with a design reference to Venice.
The bistro in the front part of the restaurant has been removed. The result is a timely and stylish restaurant boutique with connection to the classical restaurant, which invites you to linger over a glass of wine or for a honest Italian meal. Honest. Modern. Tradition-conscious.
